review_summary.allowed_conclusion: HG008 is a truth-set validation sample. It should improve confidence in caller correctness and CNV/SV benchmarking, not produce a Diana-style HRD interpretation.

evidence.detail: 40/40 HG008 truth SNVs passed tumor ALT and normal REF pileup gates.
4/4 HG008 CNV truth intervals passed normalized tumor-normal depth direction checks. Bounded reciprocal depth signal present: yes.
HG008 SV truth asset is present but no Diana SV callset exists for reciprocal-overlap confirmation.

HG008 CNV truth loss shows reduced tumor-normal depth after neutral-region normalization; SV reciprocal-overlap remains unrun. Bounded CNV depth signal: yes; normalized loss tumor-normal ratio: 0.438786. No Diana-generated SV/CNV callset or reciprocal-overlap caller output was produced in this bounded run.

adapters.blocker: Bounded truth-pileup confirmations are present, but full caller-level recall/precision is not complete.
Bounded depth-direction checks passed, but no Diana-generated CNV segment callset or segment-level reciprocal-overlap result exists.
adapters.next_action: Run CNV calling and segment-level reciprocal-overlap against HG008 truth.

adapters.blocker: No Diana-generated SV callset exists for HG008; SV reciprocal-overlap remains unrun.
adapters.next_action: Run SV caller and reciprocal-overlap against HG008 v0.5 truth.

adapters.blocker: HG008 is a truth-set validator, not a Diana HRD interpretation sample.

blockers: No Diana-generated CNV segment callset exists for HG008; current HG008 CNV evidence is bounded depth-direction validation, not segment-level reciprocal overlap.
No Diana-generated SV callset exists for HG008; SV reciprocal-overlap against v0.5 truth remains unrun.
